regulations.title: Italian Plastic Tax
regulations.summary: Manovra 2026 confirmed standard portal pathway; Novamont compostable film assessment commissioned.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: CONAI consultation response preparation underway; glass bottle reuse modelling initiated.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: DMA complete: E1 (kiln energy), E3 (water), S1 (seasonal workers), G1 (olive oil supply) material; SBTi target commitment required.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
regulations.summary: MIMIT consultation expected Q1 2026; Italian transposition likely to extend to agri first-tier suppliers.
